Dashboard.title: Reflect on setbacks. Build your next win.
Dashboard.description: Review your personal failure logs, filter by category, and turn every difficult moment into a lesson worth keeping.

Home.heroDesc: Failio is a platform to record failures, analyze causes, and use AI for improvement suggestions, ensuring every mistake becomes a valuable lesson for growth.
Home.whatHappenedDesc: Procrastinated and underestimated the material, leading to poor preparation and high pressure.
Home.aiSuggestionDesc: Break down content into daily tasks, set earlier deadlines, and check progress every night.
Home.featuresDesc: Don't just record what happened—understand the cause and turn it into real growth.
Home.feature1Desc: Record daily mistakes with details, causes, and lessons learned.
Home.feature2Desc: Let AI analyze your mistakes and suggest actionable improvements.
Home.feature3Desc: Turn failure into a continuous self-improvement system.
Home.ctaDesc: Failio helps you store every lesson in one place and grow based on evidence, not just feelings.

Auth.signInDesc: Sign in to continue turning failures into lessons.
Auth.signUpDesc: Start recording failures and turn them into growth.

Profile.title: Your Profile
Profile.desc: Manage your basic account information in Failio.
Profile.profileNote: Your profile helps personalize your Failio experience and keeps your account information organized.

CreateFailure.title: Create a new failure
CreateFailure.subtitle: Record today's mistake and turn it into a lesson.
CreateFailure.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Forgot the main point during the meeting
CreateFailure.descPlaceholder: Tell us what happened, how you felt, and what went wrong...
CreateFailure.emotionsHint: Choose emotions that match how you felt at the time.

Analytics.title: Personal
Analytics.desc: Visualize your journey from failure to wisdom. Track patterns, emotions, and lessons learned.
Analytics.growthQuote: "Every failure is a step closer to success."
